game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Smash your way through endless waves of enemies and grow absurdly powerful! Grab loot, level up, unlock characters and upgrade to create unique and crazy builds as you fend off hordes of creatures!

HOW LONG CAN YOU SURVIVE?

Megabonk is a roguelike survival game where you must fight your way through hordes of enemies and bosses in randomly generated maps. Grab loot on the way, level up your character, upgrade your weapons and survive for as long as you can! How far can you make it?

UPGRADE & GET OVERPOWERED

Defeat enemies and pick up XP to level up! The more enemies you defeat, the more XP you get. Each upgrade offer is random and will vary in rarity, which makes each run unique!

UNLOCK CHARACTERS, WEAPONS & ITEMS

  • 240 in-game quests

  • 20 Characters with unique abilities

  • 70+ unique items with different synergies

"after i started playing Megabonk my life fell apart. i lost my wife, house and dogs. good game, 10/10" - Monke
game_info.description: Fight for survival against endless waves of enemies in this roguelike arena shooter! Defeat enemies to collect XP gems and level up, choosing powerful upgrades each time. Survive as long as you can while growing stronger with each wave. The enemies get tougher, but so do you!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Fire your weapon in the direction you're facing
Shift: Dash to quickly evade enemies (cooldown applies)
Z: Use special ability when charged

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and combat mechanics. Validates that the player can move in all directions, fire weapons, and defeat basic enemies. Ensures XP collection and score tracking work correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move around the arena systematically while firing at enemies. Collect XP gems dropped by defeated enemies. Test all four movement directions and weapon firing. Avoid taking damage when possible.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves, fires weapon, defeats enemies, and collects XP. Score increases with each kill. Player survives for at least 30 seconds demonstrating basic game functionality.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the win condition by implementing an optimal survival strategy. Validates level-up system, upgrade selection, and progressive difficulty. Tests if a skilled player can survive long enough to reach a win state.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize movement to avoid enemy clusters. Use dash ability strategically to escape dangerous situations. Collect all XP gems immediately. Select upgrades that increase damage and fire rate. Focus on eliminating enemies quickly before they overwhelm the player. Survive for 90 seconds to achieve victory.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches level 5+ through strategic gameplay. Successfully survives for 90 seconds by managing resources and positioning. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Player demonstrates mastery of all game mechanics including movement, combat, abilities, and upgrade system.
